name: vibebasket-monorepo
description: Ninite for vibe coding. Bundle your AI dev setup across multiple IDEs.

scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @vibebasket/core build && pnpm --filter @vibebasket/registry build && pnpm --filter @vibebasket/adapters build
scripts.catalog:sync: pnpm --filter @vibebasket/core build && pnpm --filter @vibebasket/registry build && node scripts/catalog-sync.mjs
scripts.catalog:sync:dry: pnpm --filter @vibebasket/core build && pnpm --filter @vibebasket/registry build && node scripts/catalog-sync.mjs --dry-run
scripts.verify:ci: pnpm lint && pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm build:web && pnpm test
